content:
ITEM 6. SELECTED FINANCIAL DATA
[DATE_TIME]. Selected financial data
The statement of operations data and the cash dividends declared per share for [DATE_TIME], and the balance sheet data as of [DATE_TIME], are presented in the audited consolidated financial statements of Mastercard Incorporated included in Part II, Item 8. The statement of operations data and the cash dividends declared per share for [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME], and the balance sheet data as of [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME], are not included in this Report, and are provided in Part II, Item 8 of our Annual Reports on Form 10-K for [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME].
40 MASTERCARD 2020 FORM 10-K
PART II
ITEM 7.
